reviews.text: We choose this location as it had separate bedrooms and and small kitchen. It was also next to the river and allowed fly fishing. Jay was super nice as was Caleb who chatted about fly fishing with our 14 yr old. The beds and pillows were very comfortable and quiet. We didn't need to use the fireplace or heat the space was comfortable for the 4 of us. The balconies were also fantastic and relaxing. We got more than we expected from our stay.

We had our wedding at The Landing and could not have asked for a better venue or staff. They truly went above and beyond (even staying late the night before our wedding because we had a communication issue and some of our decor was not delivered on time). When some of our floral arrangement trays sprang leaks they were super helpful and helped find materials to help us repair them. The owner, Jen, is so lovely and is clearly very invested in every wedding they host. She let us visit multiple times and also helped give us honest advice and vendor reviews, which we so grateful for!
Having everyone stay on site really made the weekend special as well. Everyone was so happy with their rooms and it was so great to be able to hang out on the lawn before the wedding.

We had our wedding at The Landing Estes Park, and I couldn't have been happier! The venue is truly stunning - it does mountain modern so well and gives such a warm, inviting vibe. We stayed onsite on the wedding night, and it was so nice! Shout out to Jen for being amazing during the whole wedding planning process and being so solid on wedding day! Just her presence made me feel more comfortable and confident that everything was going well. The Landing will forever be such a special place for us!

We loved our stay at the Landing. We stayed in a suite room and it was very spacious, lovely and very clean. There was a microwave and small fridge with freezer. Nice walk-in shower, very updated. The beauty of the property was awesome. Walk out of the room and a few feet away is the river bubbling along the property. It was quiet, peaceful and I loved that it was away from the hustle of downtown. We will definitely stay here again if we come back to the area. The price was amazing for the room and views. We felt the staff were very kind and receptive.

We absolutely love coming here!! We try to come every year for our anniversary, and it never disappoints! You can not beat the accommodations, or the views. This place is absolutely stunning. The rooms are always clean, and the staff always makes sure you have everything you need for your stay. Jay was so kind and helpful this last visit. We tell all our friends and family about The Landing, and will continue to do so. We especially love how it sits a little outside of the busy part of town. It is so quiet, and we enjoy listening to the running water as we sleep at night. There is no where else we would rather stay. The Landing at Estes Park is a must stay and see!!
